member.name: T:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler
member.summary: GitHub repository crawler that implements IDisposable for proper resource cleanup.

member.name: M:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GitHubRepoCrawler class.
member.param: Optional GitHub personal access token for authenticated requests.

member.name: M:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler.GetRepositoryContentsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves all file URLs from a GitHub repository.
member.param: A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An async enumerable of file download URLs.
member.exception: Thrown when this method is called after the object has been disposed.
Thrown when the provided URL is invalid.
Thrown when the operation is cancelled.

member.name: M:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler.GetFileContentsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously downloads file contents from a GitHub URL.
member.param: A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A GitHubFileResponse containing the file content and metadata.
member.exception: Thrown when this method is called after the object has been disposed.
Thrown when the URL is null or empty.
Thrown when the file cannot be fetched.
Thrown when the operation is cancelled.

member.name: M:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler.ThrowIfDisposed
member.summary: Throws an ObjectDisposedException if this instance has been disposed.

member.name: M:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the GitHubRepoCrawler.

member.name: M:GitHubCrawler.GitHubRepoCrawler.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the GitHubRepoCrawler and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.
